name: gstack
description: Garry's Stack — Claude Code skills + fast headless browser. One repo, one install, entire AI engineering workflow.

scripts.build: bun run gen:skill-docs && bun build --compile browse/src/cli.ts --outfile browse/dist/browse && bun build --compile browse/src/find-browse.ts --outfile browse/dist/find-browse && git rev-parse HEAD > browse/dist/.version && rm -f .*.bun-build
scripts.test: bun test browse/test/ test/ --ignore test/skill-e2e.test.ts --ignore test/skill-llm-eval.test.ts
scripts.test:all: bun test browse/test/ test/ --ignore test/skill-e2e.test.ts --ignore test/skill-llm-eval.test.ts && SKILL_E2E=1 bun test test/skill-e2e.test.ts
